title: Life 50 Years Ago, Past, Life
questions: What were some key events of the 1960s? Do you know anything about the "Space Race?" What wars were fought in the 1960s? What was the cold war and why did it matter?
Describe your country in the 1960s? What was the economic situation during that period? Who was the President or leader in your country? How did people travel?
What do you think was the most common job? Did most people go to university? What do you think people learned in school? How much money was a high salary?
How did people communicate without cell phones or computers? How many people had cars? How many people travelled to other countries? What do you think teenagers did for fun?
Would you like to go back to the 1960s? If you were a teenager in the 1960s how would your life be different? Would you have the same dreams as you do now?
